{% comment %} This automatically collects all tags from your posts and displays them by frequency {% endcomment %} {% assign all_tags = site.posts | map: 'tags' | flatten | uniq %} {% assign tag_counts = '' | split: '' %} {% comment %}Calculate tag frequencies{% endcomment %} {% for tag in all_tags %} {% assign tag_count = site.posts | where_exp: "post", "post.tags contains tag" | size %} {% assign tag_data = tag | append: ':' | append: tag_count %} {% assign tag_counts = tag_counts | push: tag_data %} {% endfor %} {% comment %}Sort by frequency and display{% endcomment %} {% assign sorted_tags = tag_counts | sort %} {% for tag_data in sorted_tags reversed %} {% assign tag_parts = tag_data | split: ':' %} {% assign tag_name = tag_parts[0] %} {% assign tag_count = tag_parts[1] | plus: 0 %} {% comment %}Determine tag size based on frequency{% endcomment %} {% if tag_count >= 5 %} {% assign tag_size = 'tag-size-5' %} {% elsif tag_count >= 4 %} {% assign tag_size = 'tag-size-4' %} {% elsif tag_count >= 3 %} {% assign tag_size = 'tag-size-3' %} {% elsif tag_count >= 2 %} {% assign tag_size = 'tag-size-2' %} {% else %} {% assign tag_size = 'tag-size-1' %} {% endif %} {% assign display_name = tag_name | replace: '-', ' ' | capitalize %} {{ display_name }} {% endfor %}

Featured Analysis

{% comment %} This automatically shows all your posts (except those already featured) Every new post you add will appear here automatically {% endcomment %} {% assign featured_posts = site.posts | where: "featured", true %} {% assign featured_urls = featured_posts | map: "url" %} {% assign non_featured_posts = site.posts | where_exp: "post", "featured_urls contains post.url == false" %} {% for post in non_featured_posts limit: 6 %} {% if post.featured_image %} {% else %} {% comment %}Default images based on category{% endcomment %} {% if post.categories[0] == 'tech' %} {% elsif post.categories[0] == 'policy' %} {% else %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
{% if post.categories[0] == 'tech' %} {{ post.category_display | default: 'Technical' }} {% elsif post.categories[0] == 'policy' %} {{ post.category_display | default: 'Policy' }} {% else %} {{ post.category_display | default: 'Case Study' }} {% endif %}
